_comment: TEMPLATE -- copy this file, rename to <prospect-slug>.json, fill in real values. Required fields: business_name, trade, city, state, phone. Everything else is optional but more = better output.
service_radius: Effingham, Mattoon, Vandalia, and surrounding communities within 25 miles
_reviews_comment: To render the card-grid treatment, fill in 3 reviews below using the example shape. Duplicate the object as many times as needed. Keep the field types exact: rating is an integer (5, not "5"); author/date/platform/text are plain strings. Any review entry that still contains the EXAMPLE or REPLACE marker is dropped automatically by build.py -- it will never render. 1 or 2 valid reviews falls back to the aggregate-only widget; 0 valid reviews + google_review_score set also falls back; both empty omits the section entirely.

reviews.author: Mari G.
reviews.text: My plumbing problem may not have been an emergency, but it was too me. When I first called and explained the issue, I was told that they would call me back and make an appointment. When they called back, it was too say that they could send a plumber right away. He was polite and efficient and fixed 2 separate problems. Thank you, Drees Plumbing, for your quick response! I will recommend your service to any one who needs a plumber!

reviews.author: Judy W.
reviews.text: Very good service. They responded promptly and fixed the problem. Thankful for Drees plumbing.

reviews.author: Mark W.
reviews.text: As usual, repairs were made with great care and the service person was very polite and courteous!
